element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Chuck attacks by extending face or jumping on enemies; core combat loop
Players can choose difficulty via health configuration; health upgrades found in levels
Boomerang-like behavior; lost on damage; expands combat options
Invincibility, screen-clear effects; player-controlled usage adds strategic layer
Integrated with level geometry; require avoidance or careful navigation

element_introduction_order.element: Collectible items for Dr. Frank N. Stein
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Some levels require specific items; optional/mandatory progression gating
Climactic area finales; test mastery of mechanics learned in preceding levels
Checkpoint-like mechanic; provides relief and restorative breath in level flow

typical_relief_triggers: Defeating enemies or clearing screen with potions
Safe platforming passages between hazard zones
typical_tension_triggers: Loss of skull power-up on damage
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Steady escalation with area-based climaxes; health management creates wave-like tension cycles through individual levels; boss encounters provide structural tension peaks

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Skull power-up pickups signal combat-intensive sections; potion placement suggests upcoming hazards or challenging passages

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction of platforming and basic combat; configurable health (1-3 hearts) allows player-selected difficulty baseline
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy density and hazard complexity; introduction of specialized items and potion management; skull power-up becomes central to combat strategy
difficulty_curve.late_game: Cumulative challenge with mixed hazard types; health upgrades up to 5 hearts available; mandatory item collection creates additional objective complexity
notable_spikes: Boss encounters at end of each area represent difficulty peaks
Levels requiring specific item collection for progression impose skill-gated advancement

notable_level_patterns.description: Island shaped like skeleton; individual levels named after skeletal parts (Abdomainland, Armington, etc.). Thematic naming reinforces world cohesion and memorability.
Game divided into areas; each area culminates in a boss fight. Creates rhythmic pacing with clear progression milestones and climactic encounters.
Potions (invincibility, screen-clear) collected and used at player discretion; skulls picked up as temporary weapons; health pickups distributed strategically. Creates resource management tension.
